title: The Repair Verdict
description: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: only employees are allowed in there.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Yeah. And his nose is rectangle-lar.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: We would like to meet Mr. Iceburg.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha... yeah. I get that a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you know who iceberg is?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: How can I not? Mr. Iceburg is...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: He also manages the sea train!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: He is also a very busy man.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You just want your ship repaired right?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: It's docked at the pen- insula...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Check it out? With the yagara bull?

summary: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
